title: Bloodivores
overview: A case of insomnia sweeps across the globe. As a side effect of the drug developed to suppress this sickness of causes unknown, the “bloodivores” were born. Born from bloodivore and human parents, protagonist Mi Ryu was known as “The Child of Hope” tying bloodivore and humankind together. However, when Miryu is arrested as the principal offender in a bank robbery, he is taken to a special prison operated by the Bureau of Special Threat Management for observing bloodivores.

title: Awakening
overview: Punished for a crime he didn't commit, Miryu wakes to find himself inside a mysterious facility.

title: Hemomancy
overview: Bloodivores and hemomancers are gathered at the prison when monsters appear. As questions and suspicions mount, Mi Ryu is forced to recall unpleasant memories from his childhood.

title: Sacrifice
overview: The bloodivores and hemomancers fight together to survive. However, their alliance is fleeting.

title: Sapphire
overview: Anji's wound is deep. To save her, Mi Ryu uses the data terminal forced on him by his father. However, through it he discovers a shocking truth.

title: Choices
overview: As the bloodivores are tossed about by their cruel fate, Li Shin challenges Lu Yao, the strongest of the failures.

title: Reunion
overview: Still unable to believe the truth, Mi Ryu continues aimlessly walking while carrying Anji as though it were his punishment.

title: Countdown
overview: Why and how was Anji revived? Amidst the joy and confusion, a little traveling companion connected to the mystery joins the group. However, it is also the beginning of a new problem.

title: Meeting
overview: In order to save their new companion Yaya, Mi Ryu and company request Lu Yao's help while fully aware of the risks. Will their deal with the devil turn out in their favor?

title: Plan
overview: After rejecting Lou Yao's help, he returns to Anji and the others with uncertainty. There he encounters an awakened and deranged Lee Shin.

title: Boom
overview: Lee Shin continues his mindless rampage. Prepared to die, Mi Liu fights alone. As he fights, Anji and Chen Fong are forced to make a difficult decision.

title: Counterattack
overview: Mi Liu faces the monsters to save Yaya's life.
